## Checklist
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` with a description of my changes
- [ ] My changes are validated: `pwsh -NoProfile -File scripts\Run-Validate.ps1` passes
- [ ] All JSON / .code-workspace files are valid
- [ ] `docs/` have been updated if my change affects user-facing behavior
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` has been updated if project structure or commands changed
- [ ] I have tested the change in a clean environment
